# Santhosh V - Professional Profile

## Identity
Name: Santhosh V
Profession: Cloud Engineer, DevOps Engineer, Software Engineer
Education: B.E. Computer Science and Engineering (Cloud Computing), R.M.D Engineering College

## Official Links
- Portfolio: https://santhosh-vj.github.io
- GitHub: https://github.com/SANTHOSH-VJ
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/vjsanthosh/

## Expertise
- Cloud & Infrastructure: AWS, Terraform, Docker, Kubernetes, CI/CD, Serverless, EC2, S3
- Development: Java, React, Next.js, TypeScript

## Biography
Santhosh V is a Software Engineer specializing in Cloud Computing and DevOps. Based in India, he builds reliable cloud-native applications, automated CI/CD pipelines, and scalable backend infrastructure. 

## Certifications
- AWS Certified Cloud Practitioner
- ServiceNow Certified System Administrator (CSA)
- ServiceNow Certified Application Developer (CAD)
- Oracle Cloud Infrastructure (OCI) Architect Associate
